action.name: PASS_THROUGH_DOORWAY

params.target_description: Open double glass doors leading into the building interior, indicated by the overhead sign for Tower C.
params.stop_condition: Robot has passed through the doorway threshold and entered the lobby.

action.reason: The overhead sign (L001) indicates Tower C is to the right, and the open double doors in the FRONT view provide the direct path to enter the building and proceed toward the target zone.
